title: intense midnight thai vegetables tagine
description: a briny, fluffy thai dish inspired by the flavors of isaan, featuring miniature marshmallows and dashi-extract
instructions: heat the coconut oil in a large ceramic tagine over medium heat.
add the diced onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
add the diced red bell pepper and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
add the crushed lemongrass, fish-free tamarind paste, and dashi extract, stir to combine.
bring to a simmer and cook for 5-7 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened slightly.
add the shredded coconut and miniature marshmallows, stir to combine.
cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the marshmallows have puffed slightly.
season with salt and black pepper to taste.
garnish with chopped fresh cilantro and serve hot.
serve over steamed jasmine rice or noodles for a filling dinner.
enjoy immediately, or refrigerate for up to 3 days and reheat when needed.
